sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Health System
special_mechanics.description: Both Leila and Albatross can take two physical hits from enemies. A single hit from a bullet or projectile (laser) results in immediate death.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Default pistol with limited ammunition. When bullets run out, guns fire a slow 'chaser' bullet. Can upgrade to submachine gun via marked doors. Ammunition not carried over between levels.

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Rolling Thunder 2 is a run-and-gun arcade game focused on shooting and movement through levels rather than complex jump mechanics. Character movement appears standard for the genre with no special air control or momentum systems documented.
